ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This will overwrite your current settings and cannot be undone. Continue?

ast.name: confirm

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A variable is prefixed with two dashes --, followed by the variable name.
ast.target: 变量以两个短横线 -- 开头，后跟变量名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A variable value can be any valid CSS value.
ast.target: 变量值可以是任何有效的 CSS 值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a font name which is used to identify this font in your CSS rules/variables.
ast.target: 输入字体名称，用于在 CSS 规则/变量中标识此字体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a font file to create a new @font-face rule
ast.target: 选择一个字体文件以创建新的 @font-face 规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to update CSS after changing variable values. Choose "input" for live updates (every keystroke) or "change" to update only when you finish editing (clicking away from the field).
ast.target: 更改变量值后何时更新 CSS。选择“input”以实时更新（每次按键），或选择“change”仅在完成编辑（点击离开字段）时更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable a color picker for CSS variables that have a default hex color value.
ast.target: 为具有默认十六进制颜色值的 CSS 变量启用颜色选择器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable font imports to create @font-face CSS rules.
ast.target: 启用字体导入以创建 @font-face CSS 规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Warn before discarding unsaved changes when closing or switching between CSS editors.
ast.target: 在关闭或切换 CSS 编辑器时，丢弃未保存的更改前发出警告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, prioritize class selectors (e.g., .my-class) over data attributes.
ast.target: 启用后，优先使用类选择器（例如 .my-class）而非数据属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, always include the HTML tag (e.g., div[data-foo] instead of [data-foo]).
ast.target: 启用后，始终包含 HTML 标签（例如 div[data-foo] 而非 [data-foo]）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Attributes matching these patterns will be excluded from minimal and balanced selectors (one per line). Supports wildcards like "data-tooltip-*". Specific mode includes all attributes.
ast.target: 匹配这些模式的属性将从最小化和平衡选择器中排除（每行一个）。支持通配符，如“data-tooltip-*”。特定模式包含所有属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay before live-previewing CSS changes while typing (requires auto-apply). Lower values = faster feedback but may cause performance issues.
ast.target: 输入时实时预览 CSS 更改前的延迟（需要自动应用）。较低的值 = 更快的反馈，但可能导致性能问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show inline color picker for hex/rgb values.
ast.target: 为十六进制/RGB 值显示内联颜色选择器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show auto-completion suggestions while typing CSS properties and values.
ast.target: 输入 CSS 属性和值时显示自动完成建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show Obsidian CSS variables in auto-completion (requires live auto-completion).
ast.target: 在自动完成中显示 Obsidian CSS 变量（需要实时自动完成）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font size of the CSS editor.
ast.target: 设置 CSS 编辑器的字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Indentation width (spaces per tab level). Standard is 2 or 4.
ast.target: 缩进宽度（每个制表符级别的空格数）。标准为 2 或 4。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show line numbers in the CSS editor.
ast.target: 在 CSS 编辑器中显示行号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL to your GitHub profile page (e.g. https://github.com/username).
ast.target: 您的 GitHub 个人资料页面 URL（例如 https://github.com/username）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically format CSS using prettier formatter.
ast.target: 使用 prettier 格式化程序自动格式化 CSS。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto-scroll to expanded sections or active editors for easier navigation.
ast.target: 自动滚动到展开的部分或活动编辑器，以便于导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export or import all plugin settings. Import will overwrite current settings. File saved to vault root as cts_settings.json.
ast.target: 导出或导入所有插件设置。导入将覆盖当前设置。文件保存到保险库根目录，名为 cts_settings.json。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Most settings under CSS variables & CSS rules require the plugin's view to be reloaded to take effect.
ast.target: CSS 变量和 CSS 规则下的大多数设置需要重新加载插件视图才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control console logging verbosity for debugging
ast.target: 控制用于调试的控制台日志详细程度。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include disabled CSS rules when exporting
ast.target: 导出时包含禁用的 CSS 规则

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search and choose a snippet to import
ast.target: 搜索并选择要导入的代码片段

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Click to expand/collapse CSS editor preferences
ast.target: 点击展开/折叠 CSS 编辑器首选项

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Use of document.insertLines is deprecated. Use the insertFullLines method instead.
ast.target: document.insertLines 已弃用。请改用 insertFullLines 方法。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Use of document.insertNewLine is deprecated. Use insertMergedLines(position, ['', '']) instead.
ast.target: document.insertNewLine 已弃用。请改用 insertMergedLines(position, ['', ''])。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This is an obsolete command. Please use `openCommandPalette` instead.
ast.target: 这是一个过时的命令。请改用 `openCommandPalette`。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 已弃用 session.addGutterDecoration 的用法

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 未找到自定义变量容器

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 从保险库导入设置成功

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to import settings from vault
ast.target: 从保险库导入设置失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Snippets are enabled and require that "live auto completion" be enabled. Please disable the below "snippets" toggle before disabling this setting.
ast.target: 代码片段已启用，并且需要启用“实时自动完成”。请在禁用此设置前，先禁用下方的“代码片段”开关。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enable the above "live auto completion" toggle before enabling this setting.
ast.target: 请在启用此设置前，先启用上方的“实时自动完成”开关。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Disabling this setting requires a reload of the Obsidian window. From the command palette, run the command "reload app without saving." … click this message to dismiss.
ast.target: 禁用此设置需要重新加载 Obsidian 窗口。请从命令面板中运行“重新加载应用而不保存”命令。… 点击此消息以关闭。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to reload view. Check developer console for details.
ast.target: 重新加载视图失败。请检查开发者控制台了解详情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether the file's first docblock comment contains '@noprettier' or '@noformat' to determine if it should be formatted.
ast.target: 检查文件的第一个文档块注释是否包含'@noprettier'或'@noformat'以确定是否应进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: 打印（到标准错误）给定位置的光标在格式化后将移动到何处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符（\\n），在Linux和macOS以及git仓库中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target: 保持现有\n（通过查看第一行之后使用的字符来规范化单个文件中的混合值）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。这将用于进行解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 在文件的第一个文档块注释中插入@format编译指示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加插件。可以通过单独的`--plugin`传递多个插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target: 要求文件的第一个文档块注释中存在'@prettier'或'@format'才能对其进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符而不是空格进行缩进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep as multi-line, if there is a newline between the opening brace and first property.
ast.target: 如果左花括号和第一个属性之间有换行符，则保持多行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fit to a single line when possible.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号而不是双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 如果文本超过打印宽度则换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将开始标签的>放在最后一行而不是新行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在HTML、Vue和JSX中强制每行一个属性。

ast.target: 字体大小必须在8到72之间
